notes: Smart Map now supports floor plans as SVG (crisp, infinitely zoomable) and adds pan/zoom navigation: scroll to zoom, drag to pan, fit button, with camera pins tracking the plan. AutoCAD DWG upload is also supported where the server has the DWG converter installed (it auto-converts to a navigable vector). Plus the earlier disk loop-recording, camera recording-quality (ONVIF) and dashboard/disk-management features.
